requirement_topic.en: Minimum Energy Performance Standard — Household Refrigerating Appliances (Energy Use Rationalization Act + KS C IEC 62552)
requirement_topic.zh: 最低能效标准——家用制冷器具（《能源利用合理化法》+ KS C IEC 62552）
requirement_topic.zht: 最低能效標準——家用製冷器具（《能源利用合理化法》+ KS C IEC 62552）

summary.en: The Energy Use Rationalization Act (에너지이용 합리화법) and its Energy Efficiency Label and Standard Program (운영규정), administered by MOTIE and operated by the Korea Energy Agency (KEA, the body delivering KEMCO programmes), set mandatory energy efficiency requirements for household refrigerating appliances sold in South Korea. The programme applies to refrigerators, freezers, refrigerator-freezers and Kimchi refrigerators. Key requirements include: (1) Minimum Energy Performance Standard (MEPS) — each model must meet a minimum efficiency threshold expressed via a relative efficiency ratio calculated from measured energy consumption against a standard consumption formula for the appliance's rated volume and class; products failing the minimum cannot be sold; (2) Assignment of an efficiency grade on a 1-to-5 scale (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 the minimum threshold); (3) Measurement to KS C IEC 62552 (Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods, adopting the IEC 62552 series); (4) Mandatory model registration with the Korea Energy Agency before sale. Korea periodically tightens the grade boundaries and MEPS, so previously qualifying models can be re-graded or fall below MEPS on revision.
summary.zh: 由产业通商资源部主管、韩国能源公团（KEA，负责实施KEMCO项目的机构）运作的《能源利用合理化法》（에너지이용 합리화법）及其《能效标识及标准运营规定》，为在韩国销售的家用制冷器具设定了强制性能效要求。该项目适用于电冰箱、冷冻箱、冰箱-冷冻箱组合及泡菜冰箱。核心要求包括：（1）最低能效标准（MEPS）——每款型号须满足以相对能效比表示的最低效率门槛，该比值由实测耗电量与按器具额定容积及类别计算的标准耗电量公式相比得出；不达最低标准的产品不得销售；（2）按1至5级评定能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）；（3）依据KS C IEC 62552（家用制冷器具——特性和试验方法，采用IEC 62552系列）进行测量；（4）销售前向韩国能源公团强制登记型号。韩国定期收紧等级边界及MEPS，故此前合格的型号在标准修订时可能被重新评级或低于MEPS。
summary.zht: 由產業通商資源部主管、韓國能源公團（KEA，負責實施KEMCO項目的機構）運作的《能源利用合理化法》（에너지이용 합리화법）及其《能效標識及標準運營規定》，為在韓國銷售的家用制冷器具設定了強制性能效要求。該項目適用於電冰箱、冷凍箱、冰箱-冷凍箱組合及泡菜冰箱。核心要求包括：（1）最低能效標準（MEPS）——每款型號須滿足以相對能效比表示的最低效率門檻，該比值由實測耗電量與按器具額定容積及類別計算的標準耗電量公式相比得出；不達最低標準的產品不得銷售；（2）按1至5級評定能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）；（3）依據KS C IEC 62552（家用製冷器具——特性和試驗方法，採用IEC 62552系列）進行測量；（4）銷售前向韓國能源公團強制登記型號。韓國定期收緊等級邊界及MEPS，故此前合格的型號在標準修訂時可能被重新評級或低於MEPS。

standards_or_laws: Energy Use Rationalization Act (에너지이용 합리화법) — MOTIE — enabling framework for efficiency standards and labelling
Energy Efficiency Label and Standard Program operating regulation (효율관리기자재 운용규정) — Korea Energy Agency (KEA / KEMCO)
KS C IEC 62552 — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (Korean adoption of the IEC 62552 series)
Korea Energy Agency (한국에너지공단, KEA) — model registration and grade administration

summary.en: China's mandatory energy efficiency standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators). It establishes energy efficiency grades (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold) and minimum annual energy consumption limits. The standard is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR under the energy labelling system administered by the National Development and Reform Commission (NDRC). Products must display the China Energy Label (CEL) before sale. The GB 12021.2 framework uses a different test methodology and grade calculation basis than Korea's Energy Use Rationalization Act program — Chinese energy grades and Korean efficiency grades are not directly comparable.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级）。该标准规定了能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值。GB 12021.2为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）执行，能效标识制度由国家发展和改革委员会（NDRC）管理。产品在销售前须展示中国能效标识（CEL）。GB 12021.2框架使用的试验方法及等级计算基准与韩国《能源利用合理化法》项目不同——中国能效等级与韩国能效等级不可直接比较。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級）。該標準規定了能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值。GB 12021.2為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）執行，能效標識制度由國家發展和改革委員會（NDRC）管理。產品在銷售前須展示中國能效標識（CEL）。GB 12021.2框架使用的試驗方法及等級計算基準與韓國《能源利用合理化法》項目不同——中國能效等級與韓國能效等級不可直接比較。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method standard, aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Three major gaps exist between Chinese energy compliance and Korea's efficiency requirements: (1) Different grade calculation and MEPS — Korea's Energy Use Rationalization Act program uses its own relative-efficiency-ratio methodology and MEPS thresholds, distinct from GB 12021.2-2015; a Chinese Grade 1 or Grade 2 rating does NOT guarantee compliance with Korean MEPS or map to a Korean grade without independent recalculation to the Korean methodology. (2) KEA registration — manufacturers must register each model with the Korea Energy Agency before sale; there is no equivalent Chinese pre-registration with the Korean authority. (3) Test methodology and grid — measurement to KS C IEC 62552 is required; although GB/T 8059-2016 also aligns with IEC 62552, the Korean program may apply its own annual-consumption and test-condition specifics (including the 60 Hz grid), so Chinese test data should be re-verified or re-measured to KS C IEC 62552 for the Korean grade assignment. Korea periodically tightens MEPS, which can disqualify models previously meeting only Chinese standards.
gap.zh: 中国能效合规与韩国能效要求之间存在三大差距：（1）等级计算与MEPS不同——韩国《能源利用合理化法》项目采用其自有的相对能效比方法及MEPS门槛，与GB 12021.2-2015不同；中国1级或2级评定不保证符合韩国MEPS，也不能在未按韩国方法独立重新计算的情况下对应到韩国等级。（2）KEA登记——制造商须在销售前向韩国能源公团登记每款型号；中国在韩国主管机构无同等预登记。（3）试验方法与电网——须依据KS C IEC 62552测量；虽然GB/T 8059-2016亦与IEC 62552对齐，但韩国项目可能采用其自有的年耗电量及试验条件细节（包括60 Hz电网），故中国检测数据应针对KS C IEC 62552重新核验或重新测量以确定韩国等级。韩国定期收紧MEPS，可能使此前仅符合中国标准的型号不合格。
gap.zht: 中國能效合規與韓國能效要求之間存在三大差距：（1）等級計算與MEPS不同——韓國《能源利用合理化法》項目採用其自有的相對能效比方法及MEPS門檻，與GB 12021.2-2015不同；中國1級或2級評定不保證符合韓國MEPS，也不能在未按韓國方法獨立重新計算的情況下對應到韓國等級。（2）KEA登記——製造商須在銷售前向韓國能源公團登記每款型號；中國在韓國主管機構無同等預登記。（3）試驗方法與電網——須依據KS C IEC 62552測量；雖然GB/T 8059-2016亦與IEC 62552對齊，但韓國項目可能採用其自有的年耗電量及試驗條件細節（包括60 Hz電網），故中國檢測數據應針對KS C IEC 62552重新核驗或重新測量以確定韓國等級。韓國定期收緊MEPS，可能使此前僅符合中國標準的型號不合格。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — compliance with the Energy Use Rationalization Act efficiency program (MEPS + 1-to-5 grade) and Korea Energy Agency model registration are legally required before sale in South Korea
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Korea's Energy Use Rationalization Act efficiency requirements are legally binding for sale of household refrigerators in South Korea. Chinese GB 12021.2 energy grades do not substitute for Korean MEPS compliance — independent measurement to KS C IEC 62552 and grade recalculation to the Korean methodology are required. Korea Energy Agency registration is a hard gate: no registered grade plus failing MEPS means the model cannot legally be sold.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 韩国《能源利用合理化法》能效要求对家用电冰箱在韩国销售具有法律约束力。中国GB 12021.2能效等级不能替代韩国MEPS合规——须依据KS C IEC 62552独立测量并按韩国方法重新计算等级。韩国能源公团登记是强制性门槛：无登记等级且未达MEPS即无法合法销售。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 韓國《能源利用合理化法》能效要求對家用電冰箱在韓國銷售具有法律約束力。中國GB 12021.2能效等級不能替代韓國MEPS合規——須依據KS C IEC 62552獨立測量並按韓國方法重新計算等級。韓國能源公團登記是強制性門檻：無登記等級且未達MEPS即無法合法銷售。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency Grade Label — Korean 1-to-5 Grade Label + KEA Registration
requirement_topic.zh: 能效等级标识——韩国1至5级标识 + KEA登记
requirement_topic.zht: 能效等級標識——韓國1至5級標識 + KEA登記

summary.en: Under the Energy Use Rationalization Act and the Korea Energy Agency's Energy Efficiency Label and Standard Program, all household refrigerating appliances sold in South Korea must bear the Korean energy efficiency grade label displaying the 1-to-5 efficiency grade (Grade 1 most efficient), the monthly or annual energy consumption (kWh), the rated volume, CO2 emission information, and the model identifier. The supplier must measure the model to KS C IEC 62552, calculate the grade, register the model with the Korea Energy Agency (KEA) before sale, and affix the official label. The label format, colours, and content are prescribed by the program operating regulation; dealers must display the label on the product and, increasingly, in online listings. Grades and label format are revised periodically and suppliers must re-register on revision.
summary.zh: 根据《能源利用合理化法》及韩国能源公团的《能效标识及标准运营规定》，所有在韩国销售的家用制冷器具须附贴韩国能效等级标识，标注1至5级能效等级（1级最高效）、月度或年度耗电量（千瓦时）、额定容积、二氧化碳排放信息及型号标识符。供应商须依据KS C IEC 62552对型号进行测量、计算等级、在销售前向韩国能源公团（KEA）登记型号，并加贴官方标识。标识的格式、颜色和内容由项目运营规定规定；经销商须在产品上展示标识，并日益须在在线商品列表中展示。等级和标识格式定期修订，供应商须在修订时重新登记。
summary.zht: 根據《能源利用合理化法》及韓國能源公團的《能效標識及標準運營規定》，所有在韓國銷售的家用製冷器具須附貼韓國能效等級標識，標注1至5級能效等級（1級最高效）、月度或年度耗電量（千瓦時）、額定容積、二氧化碳排放資訊及型號識別符。供應商須依據KS C IEC 62552對型號進行測量、計算等級、在銷售前向韓國能源公團（KEA）登記型號，並加貼官方標識。標識的格式、顏色和內容由項目運營規定規定；經銷商須在產品上展示標識，並日益須在線上商品列表中展示。等級和標識格式定期修訂，供應商須在修訂時重新登記。

standards_or_laws: Energy Use Rationalization Act (에너지이용 합리화법) — energy efficiency grade labelling mandate
Energy Efficiency Label and Standard Program operating regulation (효율관리기자재 운용규정) — KEA / KEMCO — label format and registration rules
KS C IEC 62552 — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (basis for grade measurement)
Korea Energy Agency model registration system (energy.or.kr) — mandatory pre-sale registration

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is governed by the China Energy Label (CEL) system under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, revised 2016). The China Energy Label displays a 1-to-5 grade scale (1 highest, 5 minimum threshold) and annual energy consumption. Labels are administered by the China National Institute of Standardization (CNIS) under NDRC/SAMR. Although both China and Korea use a nominal 1-to-5 grade structure, the underlying calculation methods, test conditions and grade boundaries differ; a Chinese grade does not map to a Korean grade. Manufacturers self-declare the Chinese grade based on testing against GB 12021.2 and there is no registration with the Korean authority.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识制度依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（国家发展改革委/市场监管总局，2016年修订版）实施，采用中国能效标识（CEL）体系，展示1至5级评级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量。标识由NDRC/SAMR下属的中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理。尽管中韩两国名义上均采用1至5级结构，但其基础计算方法、试验条件和等级边界不同；中国等级不能对应到韩国等级。制造商依据GB 12021.2检测结果自我声明中国等级，且不向韩国主管机构登记。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識制度依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（國家發展改革委/市場監管總局，2016年修訂版）實施，採用中國能效標識（CEL）體系，展示1至5級評級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量。標識由NDRC/SAMR下屬的中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理。儘管中韓兩國名義上均採用1至5級結構，但其基礎計算方法、試驗條件和等級邊界不同；中國等級不能對應到韓國等級。製造商依據GB 12021.2檢測結果自我聲明中國等級，且不向韓國主管機構登記。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (underlying grade standard)

gap.en: Two mandatory actions with no direct Chinese equivalent for Korea: (1) KEA registration — each model must be registered with the Korea Energy Agency before the first unit is sold in Korea; the registration requires the model identifier, technical parameters, the KS C IEC 62552-measured consumption, the calculated grade, and the label file. (2) Korean energy efficiency grade label — the official 1-to-5 grade label (per the program operating regulation) must be affixed to the product and shown at point of sale and in online listings. The Chinese CEL label cannot be reused as the Korean label even though both are nominally 1-to-5 — the grade boundaries, label graphics, language, and registration authority differ. Failure to register with KEA or to display the correct label is a market-surveillance and penalty trigger under the Energy Use Rationalization Act.
gap.zh: 两项强制性要求在中国对韩国无直接对应：（1）KEA登记——每款型号须在韩国首次销售前向韩国能源公团登记；登记须包含型号标识符、技术参数、依据KS C IEC 62552测得的耗电量、计算所得等级及标识文件。（2）韩国能效等级标识——官方1至5级标识（依据项目运营规定）须加贴于产品并在销售点及在线商品列表中展示。中国CEL标识不能复用作韩国标识，即便两者名义上均为1至5级——等级边界、标识图形、语言及登记机构均不同。未向KEA登记或未展示正确标识，将触发《能源利用合理化法》下的市场监管及处罚。
gap.zht: 兩項強制性要求在中國對韓國無直接對應：（1）KEA登記——每款型號須在韓國首次銷售前向韓國能源公團登記；登記須包含型號識別符、技術參數、依據KS C IEC 62552測得的耗電量、計算所得等級及標識文件。（2）韓國能效等級標識——官方1至5級標識（依據項目運營規定）須加貼於產品並在銷售點及線上商品列表中展示。中國CEL標識不能複用作韓國標識，即便兩者名義上均為1至5級——等級邊界、標識圖形、語言及登記機構均不同。未向KEA登記或未展示正確標識，將觸發《能源利用合理化法》下的市場監管及處罰。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Korean energy efficiency grade label display and Korea Energy Agency model registration are legally required before sale in South Korea under the Energy Use Rationalization Act program
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Korea Energy Agency registration and the Korean energy efficiency grade label are mandatory hard gates for selling household refrigerators in South Korea. Chinese exporters must complete KEA registration (with KS C IEC 62552-based measurement and Korean grade calculation) before any unit is sold. The Chinese CEL label does not satisfy Korean labelling obligations despite both using a 1-to-5 scale.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 韩国能源公团登记与韩国能效等级标识是在韩国销售家用电冰箱的强制性门槛。中国出口商须在任何产品销售前完成KEA登记（依据KS C IEC 62552测量及韩国等级计算）。尽管中韩均采用1至5级体系，中国CEL标识不满足韩国标识义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 韓國能源公團登記與韓國能效等級標識是在韓國銷售家用電冰箱的強制性門檻。中國出口商須在任何產品銷售前完成KEA登記（依據KS C IEC 62552測量及韓國等級計算）。儘管中韓均採用1至5級體系，中國CEL標識不滿足韓國標識義務。
